overall.description: First-person exploration through an abandoned post-apocalyptic urban environment resembling Pripyat's Palace of Culture and Hotel Polissya area. The player walks through overgrown streets, past Soviet brutalist architecture, military camps, and dark underpasses in a gloomy, overcast atmosphere with high-quality game engine graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned entry road with metal gantry and distant palace

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along cracked asphalt road toward the distant Palace of Culture building

entered.detail: large rusted metal truss structure spanning the road at the entry point
massive Soviet brutalist concrete building with tall columns visible in the distance
rusted truck wreckage and debris piled near the roadside
tall Soviet-era street lighting poles lining the right side of the road
tall white-barked trees with sparse autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking under a large metal gantry structure into an abandoned urban area. The camera moves along a cracked asphalt road toward the imposing Palace of Culture building visible in the hazy distance, passing abandoned vehicles and overgrown vegetation on the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace of culture exterior with massive concrete columns

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the imposing concrete palace, observing the tall columns and Cyrillic signage on the facade

entered.detail: tall vertical concrete pillars supporting the palace facade, creating a colonnade effect
red painted Cyrillic text reading 'Дворец Культуры' across the top of the building
wide weathered staircase leading up to the palace entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and moves alongside the massive Palace of Culture building, revealing its imposing Soviet brutalist architecture with tall concrete columns and faded red Cyrillic signage. The metal gantry structure passes out of view behind as the camera follows the building's facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: military camp with green tents near concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: navigating through muddy tracks past abandoned military encampment toward the overpass

entered.detail: green canvas military tents set up in a temporary camp configuration
derelict military-style truck with canvas cover parked near the tents
elevated highway or railway bridge structure crossing the path ahead
makeshift wooden fences and barriers around the camp area

segments.scene_description: Moving past the Palace of Culture, the scene transitions to an abandoned military camp with green canvas tents and a derelict truck. The ground becomes muddy dirt tracks as the camera approaches a large concrete overpass structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark concrete underpass beneath highway overpass

events.description: entering deep shadow beneath the concrete overpass, visibility drops significantly as daylight fades
approaching the exit of the underpass, daylight becomes visible at the far end

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through the dark underpass beneath the highway structure, navigating around debris

entered.detail: massive square concrete support pillars holding up the overpass structure
abandoned wooden furniture and tables scattered in the underpass
scattered rubble, broken concrete, and trash covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the dark, shadowy underpass beneath the concrete overpass, transitioning from natural daylight to low-light conditions. The space is enclosed by massive concrete pillars and scattered with debris and abandoned furniture, creating a tense, confined atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open park area with abandoned Hotel Polissya

events.description: exiting the dark underpass into open area revealing the tall Hotel Polissya building surrounded by trees

agents.ego_description: emerging from the underpass into an open flooded area and approaching the abandoned hotel building

entered.detail: tall abandoned hotel building with visible Cyrillic signage 'ГОТЕЛЬ ПОЛІССЯ' on the roof
low concrete barrier wall running alongside the path
water-covered asphalt and puddles reflecting the overcast sky

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark underpass, the scene opens into a flooded park area with the iconic abandoned Hotel Polissya rising in the background. The camera moves through water-covered ground toward the tall building, transitioning from the confined darkness back to the open, hazy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate urban street through a claustrophobic underpass and into a flooded parkland. It begins by passing under a large metal gantry and moving along a cracked asphalt road toward the imposing Palace of Culture, which looms through the haze. As the camera glides alongside the building's brutalist concrete columns and faded red signage, the scene shifts toward an abandoned military camp characterized by green canvas tents and muddy dirt tracks. The movement then leads directly into the oppressive shadows of a concrete underpass, where daylight vanishes and the space becomes confined by massive pillars and scattered debris. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness into an open, hazy atmosphere, wading through water-covered ground toward the towering silhouette of the abandoned Hotel Polissya.
